name: Release gates (comprehensions over entity data)
source: Deploy-freeze / approvals pattern; entity-data counterpart to the terraform & kubernetes input-document scenarios

cases.name: green checks + two lead approvals ships
failed check freezes release despite approvals (deny wins)
one lead approval is not enough for a developer
release manager ships with a single lead approval
service with NO checks attribute: empty iteration, approvals decide
release manager blocked by failed check too
